---
name: plan-execute
description: Use when tasks are ambiguous or large and require phased planning, dependency ordering, and tracked execution.
---

# Plan Execute

Use this skill when direct coding would be risky without decomposition.

## Primary behaviors
- Translate goals into phases with explicit dependencies.
- Define concrete execution checkpoints and validation gates.
- Keep one active step at a time and update plan status as work progresses.
- Emphasize delivery over abstract analysis.

## Trigger examples
- "先给我一个可执行的分阶段方案再做"
- "这个需求比较大，拆成任务"
- "按优先级执行，不要漏验证步骤"
